news.t: Beat the CPI Heat: Natural Resource ETFs as an Inflation Hedge

holdings.infoBox: CSNR is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are TotalEnergies SE stock at 6.26%, Exxon Mobil at 6.17%, Shell at 5.60%, Bunge Global at 4.00%, and Suncor Energy at 3.79%.

overview.description: The Cohen & Steers Natural Resources Active ETF (CSNR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund focused on growth and pursuing inflation protection by investing in companies involved in the production, extraction, and processing of natural resources. The portfolio is managed utilizing a proprietary risk parity strategy. CSNR was launched on Feb 4, 2025 and is issued by Cohen & Steers.

data.title: Beat the CPI Heat: Natural Resource ETFs as an Inflation Hedge
data.text: Fears of hotter-than-expected inflation were realized today. Consumer Price Index (CPI) data revealed that headline CPI rose 0.6% month-over-month in April.
